steps: Go to https://partners.shopify.com and log in or create a free Partner account
From the Partner Dashboard, click 'Apps' in the left sidebar
Choose 'Create app manually' or use the Shopify CLI
Enter your app name and click 'Create app'
In the app configuration, go to 'Client credentials' (under Configuration > Build > Client credentials)
Copy the 'Client ID' (API key) and 'Client secret' (API secret key)
Set up your allowed redirect URLs under the 'App setup' section
Install the app on a store to begin the OAuth flow and obtain an access token

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID (API Key)
credential_fields.description: The Client ID for your Shopify Partner app, used to initiate the OAuth authorization flow.

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret (API Secret Key)
credential_fields.description: The Client Secret for your Shopify Partner app, used to exchange authorization codes for access tokens.

notes: Replace {store_name} with the actual Shopify store name (the subdomain on myshopify.com)
Free Shopify Partner account available at https://partners.shopify.com/signup
Development stores are free for Partners and can be used for testing
The API base URL is per-store: https://{store_name}.myshopify.com/admin/api/{version}/
Access tokens are per-store — each store installation yields its own token via OAuth
Never expose your Client Secret in frontend code or public repositories
The 'X-Shopify-Access-Token' header is used instead of 'Authorization: Bearer'

test_endpoint.description: Get shop details to verify the access token
